rwlock.h(3) Library Functions Manual rwlock.h(3)

NAME

rwlock.h - Cross-platform read-write lock interface for ascii-chat.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct rwlock_t
Read-write lock type (POSIX: pthread_rwlock_t with debug tracking).

Macros


#define LOG_RWLOCK_STATE(rwlock)

Read-Write Lock Macros



#define rwlock_rdlock(lock)
Acquire a read lock (with debug tracking in debug builds). #define rwlock_wrlock(lock)
Acquire a write lock (with debug tracking in debug builds). #define rwlock_rdunlock(lock)
Release a read lock (with debug tracking in debug builds). #define rwlock_wrunlock(lock)
Release a write lock (with debug tracking in debug builds).

Functions


bool debug_sync_is_initialized (void)
int debug_sync_rwlock_rdlock (rwlock_t *rwlock, const char *file_name, int line_number, const char *function_name)
int debug_sync_rwlock_wrlock (rwlock_t *rwlock, const char *file_name, int line_number, const char *function_name)
int debug_sync_rwlock_rdunlock (rwlock_t *rwlock, const char *file_name, int line_number, const char *function_name)
int debug_sync_rwlock_wrunlock (rwlock_t *rwlock, const char *file_name, int line_number, const char *function_name)
int rwlock_init (rwlock_t *lock, const char *name)
Initialize a read-write lock with a name. int rwlock_destroy (rwlock_t *lock)
Destroy a read-write lock. void rwlock_on_rdlock (rwlock_t *rwlock)
Hook called when a read lock is successfully acquired. void rwlock_on_wrlock (rwlock_t *rwlock)
Hook called when a write lock is successfully acquired. void rwlock_on_unlock (rwlock_t *rwlock)
Hook called when an rwlock is unlocked (read or write). void rwlock_log_state (const rwlock_t *rwlock, const char *file, int line, const char *func)
Log the state of a read-write lock. int rwlock_init_impl (rwlock_t *lock)
Initialize a read-write lock (implementation function). int rwlock_destroy_impl (rwlock_t *lock)
Destroy a read-write lock (implementation function). int rwlock_rdlock_impl (rwlock_t *lock)
Acquire a read lock (implementation function). int rwlock_wrlock_impl (rwlock_t *lock)
Acquire a write lock (implementation function). int rwlock_rdunlock_impl (rwlock_t *lock)
Release a read lock (implementation function). int rwlock_wrunlock_impl (rwlock_t *lock)
Release a write lock (implementation function).

Detailed Description

Cross-platform read-write lock interface for ascii-chat.

Definition in file rwlock.h.
